name: Factorio
author: ops@refx.example
description: Build and automate a sprawling factory. Official free headless dedicated server (no Steam required).

installScript.script:
set -euo pipefail
cd /mnt/server
echo 'Downloading Factorio headless (stable)...'
curl -fsSL "https://www.factorio.com/get-download/stable/headless/linux64" -o factorio.tar.xz
tar xJf factorio.tar.xz --strip-components=1 -C /mnt/server
rm -f factorio.tar.xz
mkdir -p saves
[ -f data/server-settings.json ] || cp data/server-settings.example.json data/server-settings.json
chmod +x bin/x64/factorio 2>/dev/null || true
# Render server name + description into server-settings.json (config lives in the
# install script — the agent renders only its own {path,content} files).
if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  tmp=$(mktemp)
  jq --arg n "${SERVER_NAME}" --arg d "${SERVER_DESCRIPTION}" --argjson m "${MAX_PLAYERS:-0}" \
    '.name=$n | .description=$d | .max_players=$m' data/server-settings.json > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" data/server-settings.json
fi
echo 'Factorio install complete.'

variables.description: Save file name (created on first boot).
